title: senecio pattersonensis
intro: Senecio pattersonensis, also known as Patterson's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the liver and gallbladder, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio pattersonensis include its potential to treat liver and gallbladder issues, as well as its use as an antispasmodic and expectorant. Senecio pattersonensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
